title: dipterostemon capitatus subsp. pauciflorus
intro: Dipterostemon capitatus subsp. pauciflorus is a rare and unique plant species, often referred to as a desert marigold or a rare desert marigold. It is a flowering plant known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of soothing and calming the body. Herbal preparations of Dipterostemon capitatus subsp. pauciflorus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
